_comment: Colorway vocabulary for extraction from titles, and per model-line tier maps. Tiers: 'core' colorways are the always-in-demand staples, 'rare' carry a scarcity premium, 'standard' is a recognized colorway with no tier opinion yet, 'unknown' means no colorway was found in the listing text. Tier maps grow with real data; unmapped known colorways default to 'standard'.
